Multidisciplinary Engineering, Procurement, Construction, Operations & Maintenance, and Manpower solutions serving global refinery, petrochemical, wind, solar, and industrial infrastructure.

02 / VISUALIZING INFRASTRUCTURE

The Engineering Universe

Watch blueprint drawings transform into real industrial facilities. Our precision CAD processes convert complex engineering requirements into physical, operations-ready assets.

03 / WHO WE ARE

Seasoned EPC Industry Experts

Enconsta is a dynamic engineering solutions provider established by a team of seasoned industry professionals.

With a strong foundation in multidisciplinary engineering and design, the company brings together decades of versatile experience across onshore and offshore projects, including refineries, petrochemicals, power plants, and other industrial infrastructure.

Enconsta operates with a global outlook, leveraging its extensive resource pool and strategic partnerships to deliver high-quality, end-to-end engineering and commissioning solutions.

Our Vision

To become a globally respected provider of comprehensive engineering services, delivering innovative design and detailing solutions to the Process and Energy industries.

Our Mission

To deliver high-quality engineering services tailored to meet client needs, integrating intelligent design, creative problem-solving, and a commitment to performance excellence.

04 / CORE METRICS

Why Partners Trust Enconsta

Our operational metrics are the foundation of our engineering integrity and regional reach.

Multidisciplinary Delivery
05 / SERVICES VERTICALS

End-to-End Solutions

Comprehensive multidisciplinary services supporting energy and infrastructure asset lifecycles.

06A / CAPABILITIES

Process & Mechanical Design

High-fidelity simulation, thermal design, and technical safety audits for heavy process industries.

Process Modeling

Process simulation, P&ID drafting, steady-state hydraulics, and terminal designs.

Mechanical Validation

Static calculations (PV Elite), rotating machinery sizing, and FAT witness support.

// PROCESS SIMULATION ENGINE STATUS: ACTIVE PRESSURE: 42.5 BAR FLOW RATE: 105 MMSCFD
06B / CAPABILITIES

Civil & Piping Systems

Detailed structural calculations, dynamic foundation design, and 3D piping routing.

Civil & Structural

Pipe racks, dynamic steel supports, composite layouts, and STAAD-Pro validations.

Piping Engineering

3D modeling (PDMS, E3D), Caesar II stress checks, and isometric extractions.

// STRESS TESTING ENGINE CAESAR II LOAD CASE 4 MAX EXPANSION: 12.3mm BENDING RATIO: 0.72 [PASS]
06C / CAPABILITIES

Electrical & Instrumentation

Sizing grid lines, designing controls architectures, and telecom setups.

Electrical Grid Sizing

ETAP load analysis, cable sizing, earthing grids, and hazardous classifications.

Instrumentation & F&G

DCS/PLC architectures, SCADA automation loops, and fire & gas telemetry.

// CONTROL LOOP DIAGRAM SPI INTOOLS v12.4 SIGNAL: 4-20mA HART LOOP STATUS: LOCK STABLE
06D / CAPABILITIES

AI & Software Platforms

AI-driven document checking, smart design audits, and reliability modeling.

AI Design Command

Automated P&ID checks, doc generation, and safety criticality analytics.

Engineering Software Stack

Unisim, Olga, Pipenet, PDS, E3D, Caesar II, and PV Elite integrations.

// AI ENGINE SCANNING... MODEL: ENCONSTA_NET_v2 ANOMALY INDEX: 0.002% OPTIMIZATION PROFILE: ENGAGE
07 / DIGITAL TWIN INTELLIGENCE

AI Engineering Command Center

Integrating neural computing platforms into legacy engineering pipelines to automate checking and secure operations.

01

Plant Model Reconstruction

Procedural structures are mapped with sensor fields to create live digital twins.

02

AI Asset Analysis

Algorithms parse drawings and configurations to check compliance limits.

03

Risk & Integrity Detection

Predictive loops analyze stresses (RBI API 580) and flags corrosion risks.

04

Operational Optimization

CMMS asset registers dynamically adjust cycles to extend equipment life.

08 / SUSTAINABLE INFRASTRUCTURE

Decarbonizing Energy

Guiding process plants and grids through the green transition. Sizing structural grids for offshore wind farms, solar fields, and battery storage centers.

09 / GLOBAL NETWORK

International Operations

With operations centers, fabrication units, and engineering offices in Dubai, Chennai, Hyderabad, and Bengaluru, we execute projects across the Middle East, Africa, and Europe.

10 / TRUST SIGNALS

Facilities Covered & Project History

Our track record encompasses large-scale refineries, gas plants, jetties, wind assets, and petrochemical installations.

Representative Executed Projects
